meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Scaling SaaS with Starter Kits
content.seo_description: Stop manual coding. Use a SaaS starter kit, Antigravity, and Claude Code to build faster, scale projects, and impress clients with professional output.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck in freelancing is reinventing the wheel for every client. By implementing a modular SaaS starter kit, you unify your tech stack. Using Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for rapid implementation, you transform your workflow from manual labor to automated, repeatable, and high-margin product delivery.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, another deadline is looming, and you are staring at the same authentication boilerplate you wrote three months ago. You are trapped in the 'custom-build cycle,' where every project starts from zero, killing your margins and stalling your growth. The dream of scaling your freelance business feels like a distant fantasy when you are bogged down by repetitive configuration.

But the architecture of your success is about to change. By leveraging a high-performance SaaS starter kit, you stop being a code-monkey and start being a product architect. This isn't just about speed; it's about building an engine that generates high-quality, production-ready code while you focus on the unique business logic that actually pays the bills.

steps.title: Define the Modular Blueprint
steps.description: Establish a core directory structure that separates concerns, ensuring your starter kit is plugin-ready for any client niche.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a scalable folder structure for a Next.js SaaS starter kit including modules for Auth, Billing, Database, and UI components.

steps.title: Automate Authentication Logic
steps.description: Integrate a robust, secure authentication flow that is pre-configured to handle sessions, roles, and protected routes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build an authentication module using NextAuth with JWT support, including pre-built sign-in, sign-up, and forgot password pages.

steps.title: Standardize Database Schema
steps.description: Implement a schema-first approach using an ORM, allowing for quick migrations and type-safe data access across all projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with models for Users, Organizations, and Subscriptions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "npx prisma db push && npx prisma generate"

steps.title: Implement Stripe Billing Hooks
steps.description: Don't write billing logic twice. Use a pre-configured webhook handler to sync subscription states with your database.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Stripe webhook handler that listens for subscription.updated events and updates the user's status in the database.

steps.title: Finalize and Stress Test
steps.description: Run an automated audit to ensure code quality and security standards are met before deploying the starter kit to a new client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security and performance audit on the generated codebase, suggesting optimizations for production readiness.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "npm run lint && npm run test"

pro_tips: Always wrap your third-party API calls in an abstraction layer so you can swap providers without breaking your entire codebase.
Use environment-specific configuration files instead of hardcoding keys, and automate secret management with a CLI tool.
Keep your starter kit 'lean'—if you haven't used a feature in three projects, delete it to reduce technical debt.
Implement a 'version control' strategy for your starter kit so you can pull updates into existing client projects seamlessly.
Use Claude Code to generate 'self-documenting' code comments; it saves hours of client onboarding time.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is live, create a private repository to maintain it. Start by applying it to a small, low-stakes project to stress-test your architecture before moving to high-value client work.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate and start scaling your freelance income today. Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
